build.beforeDevCommand: npm run sync-version && npm run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run sync-version && npm run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https://store.steampowered.com https://hydra-api-us-east-1.losbroxas.org https://retroachievements.org; img-src 'self' https://*.steamstatic.com https://media.retroachievements.org data:; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'

bundle.longDescription: A powerful tool to manage and unlock Hydra achievements
